pages.title: Piyush Garg — Software Engineer, Content Creator, Educator
pages.text:
Piyush Garg
Software Engineer, Content Creator, Educator
I build software and teach people how to build software. Founder of Teachyst, a white-labeled LMS that helps educators monetize their content globally.
loading stats…
Activity
GitHub contributions and YouTube uploads over the last year.
Latest videos
Products
Some of the products I've been building.
Teachyst
White-labeled, multi-tenant Learning Management System that helps educators and creators monetize their content globally.
WisprType
A native macOS dictation app powered by on-device AI — speak anywhere you type, processed privately on your Mac.
Skyping
Instant peer-to-peer terminal sharing for macOS — share a live session with a 6-digit code, no config or port forwarding.
Cohorts
Live, cohort-based programs.
GenAI with JavaScript
Become a Forward Deployed Engineer. Ship real GenAI systems with LLMs, RAG, Agents & MCP in JavaScript.
Full Stack Web Development
Master modern full-stack web development with live sessions, hands-on projects, and personalized mentorship from industry experts.
Courses
Docker — Containerisation for Modern Development
Build, ship, and run apps with containers — CLI, custom images, networking, volumes, Compose, and orchestration on AWS ECS/ECR.
Full Stack Generative & Agentic AI with Python
Hands-on guide to modern AI: tokenization, agents, RAG, vector DBs, and deploying scalable AI apps.
Node.js — Beginner to Advance
From scratch to advanced — ORM, SQL, NoSQL, Express, MongoDB aggregation, Postman testing, and deployment, with projects.
Data Structures & Algorithms with Java
Master Java and DSA — OOP, linear & non-linear data structures, design principles & patterns, and Big-O complexity analysis.
© 2026
